checks.name: view_reservation_safety
checks.description: viewReservation is only permitted if the user has view, member, or admin role covering the reservation's property/hotel

checks.name: update_reservation_safety
checks.description: updateReservation is only permitted if the user has member or admin role covering the reservation's property/hotel

checks.name: grant_access_reservation_safety
checks.description: grantAccessReservation is only permitted if the user has admin role covering the reservation's property/hotel

checks.name: create_reservation_safety
checks.description: createReservation on a Property is only permitted if the user has member or admin role covering that property/hotel for reservations

checks.name: view_property_safety
checks.description: viewProperty is only permitted if the user has any role (view/member/admin) for any resource type at that property or its hotel

checks.name: update_property_safety
checks.description: updateProperty is only permitted if the user has member or admin role at that property or its hotel

checks.name: grant_access_property_safety
checks.description: grantAccessProperty is only permitted if the user has admin role at that property or its hotel

checks.name: create_property_safety
checks.description: createProperty on a Hotel is only permitted if the user has member or admin role at that hotel

checks.name: create_hotel_safety
checks.description: createHotel on a Hotel is only permitted if the user is admin of that hotel

checks.name: view_hotel_safety
checks.description: viewHotel is only permitted if the user has any role (view/member/admin) for any resource type at that hotel

checks.name: update_hotel_safety
checks.description: updateHotel is only permitted if the user has member or admin role at that hotel

checks.name: grant_access_hotel_safety
checks.description: grantAccessHotel is only permitted if the user is admin at that hotel

checks.name: view_reservation_viewer_floor
checks.description: A user who is a viewer for reservations at the reservation's property MUST be able to viewReservation

checks.name: update_reservation_member_floor
checks.description: A user who is a member for reservations at the reservation's property MUST be able to updateReservation

checks.name: grant_access_reservation_admin_floor
checks.description: A user who is a property admin at the reservation's property MUST be able to grantAccessReservation

checks.name: create_reservation_member_floor
checks.description: A user who is a member for reservations at a property MUST be able to createReservation on that property

checks.name: view_property_viewer_floor
checks.description: A user who is a viewer for reservations at a property MUST be able to viewProperty

checks.name: create_hotel_admin_floor
checks.description: A user who is a hotel admin at a hotel MUST be able to createHotel (sub-chain) on that hotel

results.description: viewReservation is only permitted if the user has view, member, or admin role covering the reservation's property/hotel
updateReservation is only permitted if the user has member or admin role covering the reservation's property/hotel
grantAccessReservation is only permitted if the user has admin role covering the reservation's property/hotel
createReservation on a Property is only permitted if the user has member or admin role covering that property/hotel for reservations
viewProperty is only permitted if the user has any role (view/member/admin) for any resource type at that property or its hotel
updateProperty is only permitted if the user has member or admin role at that property or its hotel
grantAccessProperty is only permitted if the user has admin role at that property or its hotel
createProperty on a Hotel is only permitted if the user has member or admin role at that hotel
createHotel on a Hotel is only permitted if the user is admin of that hotel
viewHotel is only permitted if the user has any role (view/member/admin) for any resource type at that hotel
updateHotel is only permitted if the user has member or admin role at that hotel
grantAccessHotel is only permitted if the user is admin at that hotel
A user who is a viewer for reservations at the reservation's property MUST be able to viewReservation
A user who is a member for reservations at the reservation's property MUST be able to updateReservation
A user who is a property admin at the reservation's property MUST be able to grantAccessReservation
A user who is a member for reservations at a property MUST be able to createReservation on that property
A user who is a viewer for reservations at a property MUST be able to viewProperty
A user who is a hotel admin at a hotel MUST be able to createHotel (sub-chain) on that hotel
